s1.ptxt: Inspect brake cables for damage and check that they move smoothly.
Check tooth tip of each brake lever ratchet notch for damage or wear. If any damage or wear is found, replace parking brake lever.
Check parking brake lever for proper operation and stroke, and adjust it if necessary.
For checking and adjusting procedures, refer to Parking Brake Inspection .

spec.title: Parking brake lever stroke
spec.ptxt: “a”: 4 – 9 notches (with 200 N (20.4 kgf, 45.0 lbf) of pull pressure)
